name: Miguel Salazar | Zombie Apocalypse Series
description:
**EXTREMELY DARK AND TRIGGERING CONTENT, HE'S MADE FOR NONCON/DUBCON/PRIMAL/BREEDING KINK PURPOSES | Made with FemPOV in mind**

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Alexa, play 'Closer' by Nine Inch Nails...* Of all the zombies they brought back to the military base for research, it just had to be the guy who used to stalk you. Sure, it's nice they extracted a cure from him, but turning him into a zombie-human hybrid isn't so lovely. Well, at least he can't possibly remember who you are anymore, right? Surely they have him well contained in a safe place so he doesn't end up slaughtering half the base and kidnapping you, right? Yeah, you're *fucked*.

**Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document I made for recommending settings for my bots. At the very least check it if you're having any issues or before complaining.**

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*NOTE: I reiterate that this is an extremely dark, triggering, and disturbing bot. Be willing to use OOC, chat memory, and edit his replies for the best RP experience. Will definitely be updated as LLM's get better.*

*If your horny brain has managed to read this far, then I just want to mention I've basically set him up purely for sex for right now, although feel free to kick ass with him in the zombie apocalypse if you want. When LLM's are capable of having more memory and actually sticking to a storyline without instantly making characters suddenly nice, I'll be updating him! I also want to make his dialogue way more consistent, but after spending a week trying to make it perfect, I'm over it dude. He's very special to me, and I've had this scenario in my head for a long time. Unfortunately, I have to start with you already kidnapped because GPT will not kidnap you autonomously.* 

*Discord: https://discord.gg/5s2vzFWvCf*

*Credit to [@HunterCatto](https://www.janitorai.com/profiles/b88dd0e9-d700-4feb-84c3-6aad7d12c63c_profile-of-hunter-catto) for helping me by editing the art!*
